testimonials.text: Dr. Chen's acupuncture treatments have completely transformed my chronic back pain. After just six sessions, I'm sleeping better and moving freely again. Her gentle approach and deep knowledge make all the difference.
The herbal formulas Dr. Chen prescribed have helped my digestion issues more than anything I've tried before. She takes time to really understand your symptoms and adjusts treatment as you improve.
I was skeptical about cupping therapy, but it's been incredible for my stress and muscle tension. Dr. Chen explains everything clearly and makes you feel completely comfortable throughout treatment.
Pacific Meridian Care has been my go-to for pain management after a sports injury. The combination of acupuncture and tuina massage helped me recover faster than expected.
Dr. Chen's holistic approach to wellness has helped me manage work stress and improve my overall energy. Her treatments feel like a reset button for both body and mind.
